title: xanthophyllum korthalsianum
intro: Xanthophyllum korthalsianum is a species of flowering plant in the family Polygalaceae, native to Southeast Asia, particularly in Indonesia and Malaysia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Xanthophyllum korthalsianum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and fighting against certain types of infections. In traditional medicine, Xanthophyllum korthalsianum is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts to harness its medicinal properties.
